title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist AI system automates medical discoveries by identifying candidate treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, and vision loss. Robin is an agent system that uses consensus mechanisms to validate findings and enable breakthroughs in drug discovery and treatment optimization.
